ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license application */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the action taken on the license */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the action record */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* Committee or individual that took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., approved, amended) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "tally" TEXT /* Vote tally or decision metrics associated with the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action taken */,
  "meeting_details" TEXT /* Details of the meeting where the action was recorded */,
  "video" TEXT /* Link to the video recording of the meeting, if available */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the type of license */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the applicant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date for the license */,
  "amendment_details" TEXT /* Details of any amendments made to the license */,
  "non_renewal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for non-renewal, if applicable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the license application */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the license application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES committees ("committee_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_meeting_details FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_details") REFERENCES meeting_logs ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's role in the licensing process */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chairperson of the committee */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the committee's meetings */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the committee */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the committee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the licensing process (e.g., official, staff, committee member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_logs" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee that held the meeting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Meeting notes and key discussions */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video recording of the meeting */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the chairperson who presided over the meeting */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* List of attendees at the meeting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the meeting log */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the meeting log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_logs_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_logs_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type (e.g., Class B Tavern License) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the license */,
  "renewal_process" TEXT /* Process for renewing the license */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the license type */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the license type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the license type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)
